label: How to Strengthen Your Wrists for Boxing
title: How to Strengthen Your Wrists for Boxing
subtitle: A practical guide to wrist strength, knuckle conditioning, hand wraps, and safer heavy bag training for beginner boxers.
description: Learn how to strengthen your wrists for boxing with safe drills, knuckle push-ups, forearm work, hand wraps, and better punching technique.
altText: Boxer wrapping hands before wrist strengthening and heavy bag training.
